name: slide-deck
description: Deckset-focused presentation skills for generating concise Markdown slide decks.

interface.longDescription: Generate minimalist, presentation-ready Markdown decks using Deckset syntax, image layout guidance, and local syntax samples.
defaultPrompt: Create a Deckset presentation from this article: <url>
Draft a minimalist executive briefing deck about <topic>.
Turn these notes into a Deckset Markdown slide deck.
